title: Donor letter model
description: Every letter is validated as structured data against this schema before any HTML is rendered. A letter that fails here is never rendered or delivered; it lands in the manifest with the specific errors. Enforced by validate_letter_model in scripts/donor_rules.py.

letter_date.description: Human-readable date derived from the campaign as_of_date

salutation.description: Built per salutation policy; never a guessed title

campaign_paragraph.description: From the approved library plus config-gated additions only

ask_paragraph.description: Must contain exactly one dollar amount, the computed ask

closing_phrase.description: House default or the adopted style profile value

ps_line.description: Optional; only from an adopted style profile
